model.name: DREAM S2 news-cycle retention
model.lambda_interpretation: lambda = elapsed hours since topic attention peak
model.signal_preprocessing: Formal S2 fit uses circadian-corrected publish-time article counts: raw count divided by expected global publishing/activity factor.
model.observation_clock: article.published_at, not GitHub Action run time
model.history_role: data/history.json retains raw article records and first_seen/last_seen provenance; publication time reconstructs the curve.
model.comparison: Delta AIC = AIC(exponential beta=1) - AIC(stretched S2 beta free)
model.cycle_archive_role: data/cycles.json stores completed formal cycle summaries so prior S2 learning remains visible when a new wave resets the current topic.

articles.title: Inequality causing 100,000 extra deaths a year from heat and cold in Europe
articles.summary: Findings come after third-hottest April on record globally and amid fears of more brutal European summer weather Economic inequality adds more than 100,000 deaths to the vast toll from heat and cold in Europe each year, research has found. Cutting the level of inequality to that of Europe’s most equal region, as measured by the Gini index, would reduce temperature-related mortality by as much as 30%, equating to 109,866 people, the study found. articles.title: Scientists discover a new way to prevent gum disease without killing good bacteria
articles.summary: Scientists have uncovered a surprising way to influence the bacteria living in our mouths — not by killing them, but by interrupting how they “talk” to each other. articles.title: Ask HN: We just had an actual UUID v4 collision...
articles.summary: I know what you're thinking... and I still can't believe it, but... This morning, our database flagged a duplicate UUID (v4). I checked, thinking it may have been a double-insert bug or something, but no. The original UUID was from a record added in 2025 (about a year ago), and today the system inserted a new document with a fresh UUIDv4 and it came up with the exact same one: b6133fd6-70fe-4fe3-bed6-8ca8fc9386cd We're using this: https://www.npmjs.com/package/uuid I thought this is technically

articles.title: Scientists make stunning discovery that could change our understanding of the Universe
articles.summary: Scientists may have uncovered a surprising secret behind why life exists at all. A new study suggests that the Universe’s fundamental constants — the deep physical rules that govern everything from atoms to stars — appear to sit within an incredibly narrow “sweet spot” that allows liquids to flow properly inside living cells. Even tiny shifts in these constants could make blood too thick, water too sticky, or cellular motion impossible, potentially wiping out life as we know it.

articles.title: Three hikers dead and 10 missing after Indonesia’s Mount Dukono volcano erupts
articles.summary: Two foreigners among the dead, say authorities, after early morning eruption spews ash miles into air Three hikers have died and 10 are missing after an eruption of Mount Dukono, on Indonesia’s eastern Halmahera island, spewed an ash cloud about 6 miles (10km) into the air, police have said. “There are three dead: two foreigners and one resident of Ternate [an island in east Indonesia],” Erlichson Pasaribu, the police chief of North Halmahera district, told Kompas TV.
